title: Miniml Hand Soap Wash Liquid 5L Refill - Cucumber & Aloe Vera Infused Hand, Skin & Body Wash Gel for Soft and Sensitive Skin Care - 100% Vegan & Cruelty Free
features: ✅ PERFECT FOR SENSITIVE HANDS: Easily wash dirt from your hands with a non toxic formula that's infused with aloe vera and cucumber. Our naturally derived all natural soap helps eliminate stubborn smells and leaves hands feeling soft, clean and fresh

✅ CUCUMBER & ALOE VERA FRAGRANCE: Our cucumber and aloe vera extract hand soap has a subtle scent you'll love. Wash and sanitise your hands with a cruelty free hand wash liquid soap that's tested, approved, soft on skin and smells heavenly on your senses

✅ ECO FRIENDLY & PURE: Our hand wash liquid soap is free from VOC’s, chlorine bleaches, solvents, lanoline, sulphates, parabens and phosphates. Our vegan soap refill is readily biodegradable, gentle on skin is effective in both hard and soft water too

✅ ZERO WASTE: Our eco friendly and fully sustainable solutions go far beyond your purchase. Simply send us back your empty bottles for professional cleaning so that they can be reused again and again. We even have refill partners across the UK to help make the world a cleaner, greener place to live
✅ PRODUCED IN THE UK: Manufactured by Miniml in The Yorkshire Dales. Proudly independent and family owned too
description: Product Description Try our 5 Litre Natural Hand Soap Cucumber & Aloe Vera Bring luxury touches into your bathroom with this Cucumber & Aloe Vera Hand Soap. This naturally derived, gel hand soap eliminates stubborn smells and leaves hands feeling soft and clean, even after multiple washes. What’s not to love? How to Use: Turn nozzle to unlock. Elbow grease not required. Can be used on hands and body. Product Features Powerful on dirt, grime & stubborn smells Leaves hands soft & loved Removes all the nasties Natural & subtle cucumber & aloe vera fragrance Free from: VOC’s, chlorine bleaches, solvents, lanoline, sulphates, parabens & phosphates PLANT POWERED & NATURAL Easily wash dirt from your hands with a non toxic formula infused with cucumber & aloe vera. Gentle on hands and naturally removes all the nasties! FRESH SUBTLE SCENT Our cucumber and aloe vera extract hand soap has a subtle scent you'll love. Wash and sanitise your hands with a cruelty free hand wash liquid soap that's tested, approved, soft on skin and smells heavenly on your senses. SUSTAINABLE REFILLS Switch to a more sustainable hand soap that comes in a bulk buy option for added value. Whether it's at home or work, easily and conveniently top up your kitchen and bathroom soap dispenser with our 5 litre refill bottle. OUR VALUES Vegan & Cruelty Free Because guinea pigs shouldn't be used as guinea pigs, we perform zero animal testing or use any animal derived ingredients. British Manufactured Manufactured by Miniml in The Yorkshire Dales. Proudly independent and family owned too. No Nasty Ingredients Free from: VOC’s, Chlorine Bleaches, Solvents, Lanoline, Sulphates (SLS/ SLES), Parabens, Phosphates and Optical Brighteners. Plant Based Formulas All our formulations are Vegan, Cruelty Free and Paraben Free. Buy our 5 litre refills and fill up your forever bottle to reuse again and again!
